evals.prompt: I'm on Scandit SDK v6 and need to migrate my BarcodeCapture Flutter integration to v7. Here's my scanner file: ScannerPage_v6.dart
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, applies the 6→7 changes in ScannerPage_v6.dart (notes the new Smart scan-intention default, keeps explicit composite-type opt-in), and summarizes all changes made. The BarcodeCapture.forContext factory is still valid in v7 so it does not have to be replaced for a 6→7 migration.

assertions.text: Composite-type opt-in (enableSymbologiesForCompositeTypes and enabledCompositeTypes) is preserved or explicitly maintained
Either the explicit ScanIntention.manual is preserved since the project set it, or the summary explains that v7 default is Smart and keeping manual is correct (semantic)
BarcodeTracking → BarcodeBatch rename is mentioned in the summary if the user asks about MatrixScan, otherwise no false rename is performed
A summary.md file is present describing changes

evals.prompt: We're upgrading our Flutter app from Scandit SDK 7 to 8. Here's our BarcodeCapture code: ScannerPage_v7.dart. Please apply any necessary changes.
evals.expected_output: The skill applies the v7→v8 changes (BarcodeCapture.forContext → BarcodeCapture(settings) + dataCaptureContext.addMode, VideoResolution.auto → BarcodeCapture.createRecommendedCameraSettings()) and summarizes the changes. DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey is left as-is because it's still valid in v8 Flutter.

assertions.text: BarcodeCapture(settings) is present in the output file
BarcodeCapture.forContext( is NOT present in the output file
dataCaptureContext.addMode( or dataCaptureContext.setMode( is called for the BarcodeCapture instance
VideoResolution.auto is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeCapture.createRecommendedCameraSettings() is applied to the camera
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is preserved, or converted to DataCaptureContext.initialize — both are acceptable on Flutter (semantic)
A summary.md is present listing the changes
Summary mentions flutter pub get must be run after the package version bump
The output file is functionally equivalent to the input otherwise — no unnecessary changes

evals.prompt: We need to upgrade our BarcodeCapture integration from SDK 6 all the way to v8. Here's our current code: ScannerPage_v6.dart
evals.expected_output: The skill applies both migrations in order (6→7 then 7→8) and summarizes all changes organized by migration step.

assertions.text: BarcodeCapture(settings) is present (7→8 constructor form applied)
BarcodeCapture.forContext( is NOT present
dataCaptureContext.addMode( or dataCaptureContext.setMode( is called for the BarcodeCapture instance
VideoResolution.auto is NOT present
BarcodeCapture.createRecommendedCameraSettings() is applied to the camera
Composite-type opt-in (enableSymbologiesForCompositeTypes and enabledCompositeTypes) is preserved
Summary covers both migration steps (references both 6→7 and 7→8)

evals.prompt: I want to upgrade my BarcodeCapture to the latest Scandit SDK version. Here's my code and pubspec.yaml.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads pubspec.yaml to detect v6.28.x, determines the target is v8, applies both migrations without asking the user for their version.

assertions.text: Summary mentions the detected version (6.28.x or v6)
Summary mentions the pubspec.yaml dependency versions need to be bumped to ^8.0.0
Summary mentions flutter pub get must be run after the bump
BarcodeCapture(settings) is present (7→8 constructor form applied)
BarcodeCapture.forContext( is NOT present
VideoResolution.auto is NOT present
BarcodeCapture.createRecommendedCameraSettings() is applied to the camera
Did not ask the user for their version — proceeded autonomously

evals.prompt: Migrate my BarcodeCapture Flutter app from v7 to v8 — but I'm only attaching one mode to the context. Use the simplest API.
evals.expected_output: The skill replaces BarcodeCapture.forContext with BarcodeCapture(settings) and uses dataCaptureContext.setMode(barcodeCapture) (single-mode helper) instead of addMode. Camera resolution is also moved to BarcodeCapture.createRecommendedCameraSettings().

assertions.text: BarcodeCapture(settings) is present in the output file
BarcodeCapture.forContext( is NOT present
dataCaptureContext.setMode( is used (single-mode helper, since the project only attaches one mode)
VideoResolution.auto is NOT present
BarcodeCapture.createRecommendedCameraSettings() is applied
A summary.md is present listing the changes
